title: A Perfect Everyday Fit, Broken Down Piece by Piece
desc: Deconstruct a full daily outfit into layered product-level notes while keeping a unified editorial mood.
prompt_template: Create a {camera_style} image of {subject} in a {location}. Break down outfit with explicit notes for {top}, {bottom}, {outerwear}, {shoes}, and {accessory}. Keep color palette as {palette}. Add {lighting} and a subtle {mood} feeling.
author: thewardrobe.lab
final_prompt: Create a 35mm documentary style image of a young woman leaning against a convenience store wall in Tokyo at blue hour. Break down outfit with explicit notes for cropped grey hoodie, washed black wide-leg jeans, oversized beige trench coat, white vintage running shoes, and silver chain shoulder bag. Keep color palette as muted earth tones with cool highlights. Add mixed neon-and-natural street lighting and a subtle calm confidence feeling.
